text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's already budding? Can I come by<n>later and
take photos? I want to add<n>them to Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's fine with me. You're always taking<n>photos
and videos, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I want to make lots of records and<n>
memories of my time here!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see you leaving likes on them too<n>sometimes.
Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You should be thanking those impressive<n>
photography skills of yours.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
By the way... Don't you want to buy a<n>proper
camera?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, I have enough features on my phone<n>camera,
and I want my photos to feel<n>candid.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've taken lots of good ones<n>recently! ♪
They're not on Umastagram<n>yet!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Which one would you like to see? I've<n>got a rare
six-leaf clover, Dober<n>sleeping, my recent
favorite ramen, a<n>video of Shakur typing...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Or how about the cute one I've got of<n>you with a
ladybug on your shoulder? ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, when did you take that last one?
